{{Infobox character
| name = Elder of Urg’naut
| aliases = Elders of Urg’naut
| species = Great elder
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elder of Urg’naut]] is a being that can mold itself into a vaguely human shape with an eye in the center of its head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Elders]] of [[Urg’naut]] watched the [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elders]] of [[Urg’naut]] collapsed and melted into darkness during the event.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Great Elders]]
